testcase.name: runScenario

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Cookies pop-up content message does not match expected [null] but found [We may use cookies and similar technologies to collect information about the ways you interact with and use the website, to support and enhance features and functionality, to monitor performance, to personalize content and experiences, for marketing and analytics, and for other lawful purposes. We also may share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services. Please, see more details on the "About" tab ]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Cookies pop-up content message does not match expected [null] but found [We may use cookies and similar technologies to collect information about the ways you interact with and use the website, to support and enhance features and functionality, to monitor performance, to personalize content and experiences, for marketing and analytics, and for other lawful purposes. We also may share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services. Please, see more details on the "About" tab ] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at com.creatio.crm.application.steps.CookiesPageSteps.verifyCookiesPopupContentMessage(CookiesPageSteps.java:26) at com.creatio.crm.application.stepDefinitions.applicationStepDefinitions.validateCookiesPopUpContentMessage(applicationStepDefinitions.java:122) at ✽.Validate the cookies pop-up content message(file:///C:/AutomationTraining/CreatioHybridFramework/UIFeatures/CookiesPage.feature:14)
